title: Authors and Citation
text: Hodge D (2026). ggrefine: Pretty 'ggplot2' Themes. R package version 0.2.0900, https://github.com/davidhodge931/ggrefine.
code: @Manual{,   title = {ggrefine: Pretty 'ggplot2' Themes},   author = {David Hodge},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.2.0900},   url = {https://github.com/davidhodge931/ggrefine}, }

title: Pretty ggplot2 Themes
text: objective ggrefine provide pretty ggplot2 complete themes, refine functions tweak easily based particulars plot.

title: Pretty ggplot2 Themes
text: Install CRAN, development version GitHub.
code: install.packages("ggrefine")  pak::pak("davidhodge931/ggrefine")

title: Pretty ggplot2 Themes
text: themes built work refine functions - can customised easily. theme_grey function differs two panel_grid_colour default derived applying multiply blend panel_background_fill. theme names ggplot2, recommended load package, instead refer theme ggrefine::theme_*.
code: library(ggplot2)  p_base_light <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy)) +   geom_histogram(     stat = "bin", shape = 21,     colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF")   ) +   scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))  p_base_dark <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy)) +   geom_histogram(     stat = "bin", shape = 21,     colour = blends::screen("#357BA2FF")   ) +   scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))  p_light  <- p_base_light + ggrefine::theme_light() + labs(title = "ggrefine::theme_light") p_dark  <- p_base_dark  + ggrefine::theme_dark() + labs(title = "ggrefine::theme_dark") p_grey <- p_base_light + ggrefine::theme_grey() + labs(title = "ggrefine::theme_grey") p_oat <- p_base_light + ggrefine::theme_grey(   panel_background_fill = flexoki::flexoki$base["base50"],)  +   labs(title = "ggrefine::theme_grey(panel_background_fill = ...)")  patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_light,   p_dark,   p_grey,   p_oat )

title: Pretty ggplot2 Themes
text: ggrefine::refine_* functions adjust gridlines axis elements based axis types (x_type y_type), default "continuous".
code: set_theme(new = ggrefine::theme_grey())  p_continuous <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = displ, y = hwy)) +   geom_point(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))  p_discrete_x <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = drv, y = hwy)) +   geom_jitter(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))   p_discrete_y <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy, y = drv)) +   geom_jitter(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))   patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_modern() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_modern"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_modern(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_modern(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_classic() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_classic"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_classic(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_classic(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_fusion() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_fusion"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_fusion(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_fusion(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_void() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_void"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_void(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_void(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_none() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_none"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_none(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_none(y_type = "discrete"),   ncol = 3 )

title: classic refine — refine_classic
text: Removes gridlines ticks discrete axes.

title: classic refine — refine_classic
code: refine_classic(x_type = "continuous", y_type = "continuous", focus = NULL, ...)

title: classic refine — refine_classic
text: x_type Character. Type x-axis: "continuous", "binned", "discrete". y_type Character. Type y-axis: "continuous", "binned", "discrete". focus Character. primary axis interest: "x" "y". Gridlines axis elements removed opposite axis. NULL (default), focus inferred x_type y_type: discrete x continuous/binned y gives "x", continuous/binned x discrete y gives "y", otherwise "x". ... Additional arguments (currently unused).

title: classic refine — refine_classic
text: ggplot2 theme object

title: classic refine — refine_classic
code: library(ggplot2) #>  #> Attaching package: ‘ggplot2’ #> The following objects are masked from ‘package:ggrefine’: #>  #>     theme_dark, theme_grey, theme_light  set_theme(new = theme_grey())  p_continuous <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = displ, y = hwy)) +   geom_point(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))  p_discrete_x <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = drv, y = hwy)) +   geom_jitter(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))  p_discrete_y <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy, y = drv)) +   geom_jitter(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))  patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_modern() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_modern"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_modern(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_modern(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_classic() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_classic"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_classic(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_classic(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_fusion() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_fusion"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_fusion(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_fusion(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_void() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_void"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_void(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_void(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_none() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_none"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_none(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_none(y_type = "discrete"),   ncol = 3 )

title: Fusion refine — refine_fusion
text: Similar refine_modern(), keeps gridlines axes continuous binned. fusion refine_modern() refine_classic().

code: refine_fusion(x_type = "continuous", y_type = "continuous", focus = NULL, ...)

Gridlines axis elements removed opposite axis. NULL (default), focus inferred x_type y_type: discrete x continuous/binned y gives "x", continuous/binned x discrete y gives "y", otherwise "x". ... title: Fusion refine — refine_fusion
code: library(ggplot2)  set_theme(new = theme_grey())  p_continuous <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = displ, y = hwy)) +   geom_point(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))  p_discrete_x <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = drv, y = hwy)) +   geom_jitter(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))  p_discrete_y <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy, y = drv)) +   geom_jitter(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))  patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_modern() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_modern"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_modern(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_modern(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_classic() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_classic"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_classic(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_classic(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_fusion() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_fusion"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_fusion(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_fusion(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_void() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_void"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_void(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_void(y_type = "discrete"),   p_continuous + ggrefine::refine_none() + labs(title = "ggrefine::refine_none"),   p_discrete_x + ggrefine::refine_none(x_type = "discrete"),   p_discrete_y + ggrefine::refine_none(y_type = "discrete"),   ncol = 3 )

title: Modern refine — refine_modern
text: Removes gridlines axis line/tick elements non-focused dimension. Also removes ticks discrete axes.

code: refine_modern(x_type = "continuous", y_type = "continuous", focus = NULL, ...)

title: Darker theme — theme_dark
text: complete theme dark panel background.

title: Darker theme — theme_dark
code: theme_dark(   ...,   text_size = 10,   text_family = "",   text_colour = flexoki::flexoki$base["base200"],   legend_place = "right",   legend_axis_line_colour = plot_background_fill,   legend_axis_line_linewidth = axis_line_linewidth,   legend_background_fill = plot_background_fill,   legend_key_fill = plot_background_fill,   legend_ticks_colour = legend_axis_line_colour,   legend_ticks_linewidth = legend_axis_line_linewidth,   legend_ticks_length = grid::unit(c(2.75, 0), "pt"),   axis_line_colour = flexoki::flexoki$base["base600"],   axis_line_linewidth = 0.25,   axis_ticks_colour = axis_line_colour,   axis_ticks_linewidth = axis_line_linewidth,   axis_ticks_length = grid::unit(3.66, "pt"),   panel_background_fill = flexoki::flexoki$base["base950"],   panel_grid_colour = "black",   panel_grid_linetype = 1,   panel_grid_linewidth = 1,   panel_grid_minor_linetype = 1,   panel_grid_minor_linewidth = 0.5,   plot_background_fill = "black",   geom_fill = "#357BA2FF",   geom_colour = geom_fill,   palette_fill_discrete = jumble::jumble,   palette_colour_discrete = palette_fill_discrete,   palette_fill_continuous = viridis::turbo(n = 256),   palette_colour_continuous = palette_fill_continuous,   panel_widths = NULL,   panel_heights = NULL )

title: Darker theme — theme_dark
text: ... Require named arguments (support trailing commas). text_size base size text theme element. Defaults 10. text_family base family text theme element. Defaults "". text_colour base colour text theme element. legend_place place legend. Either "right", "top" "bottom". legend_axis_line_colour colour legend.axis.line theme element. legend_axis_line_linewidth linewidth legend.axis.line theme element. legend_background_fill fill (colour) legend.background theme element. legend_key_fill fill (colour) legend.key theme element. legend_ticks_colour colour legend.ticks theme element. legend_ticks_linewidth linewidth legend.ticks theme element. legend_ticks_length length legend.ticks.length theme element. axis_line_colour colour axis.line theme element. axis_line_linewidth linewidth axis.line theme element. axis_ticks_colour colour axis.ticks theme element. axis_ticks_linewidth linewidth axis.ticks theme element. axis_ticks_length length axis.ticks.length theme element. panel_background_fill fill (colour) panel.background theme element. panel_grid_colour colour panel.grid theme element. panel_grid_linetype linetype panel.grid.major theme element. panel_grid_linewidth linewidth panel.grid.major theme element. panel_grid_minor_linetype linetype panel.grid.minor theme element. panel_grid_minor_linewidth linewidth panel.grid.minor theme element. plot_background_fill fill (colour) plot.background theme element. geom_fill default fill colour geom elements. geom_colour default border colour geom elements. Defaults geom_fill. palette_fill_discrete default discrete fill palette. function vector colours. palette_colour_discrete default discrete colour palette. Defaults palette_fill_discrete. palette_fill_continuous default continuous fill palette. vector colours. palette_colour_continuous default continuous colour palette. Defaults palette_fill_continuous. panel_widths panel.widths theme element. unit unit vector setting width individual panels, single unit total panel area width. Overrides aspect ratio set theme, coord, facets. Defaults NULL. panel_heights panel.heights theme element. unit unit vector setting height individual panels, single unit total panel area height. Overrides aspect ratio set theme, coord, facets. Defaults NULL.

title: Darker theme — theme_dark
text: ggplot theme.

title: Darker theme — theme_dark
code: library(ggplot2)  p_base_light <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy)) +   geom_histogram(     stat = "bin", shape = 21,     colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF")   ) +   scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) #> Warning: Ignoring unknown parameters: `shape`  p_base_dark <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy)) +   geom_histogram(     stat = "bin", shape = 21,     colour = blends::screen("#357BA2FF")   ) +   scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) #> Warning: Ignoring unknown parameters: `shape`  p_light  <- p_base_light + ggrefine::theme_light() + labs(title = "ggrefine::theme_light") p_dark  <- p_base_dark  + ggrefine::theme_dark() + labs(title = "ggrefine::theme_dark") p_grey <- p_base_light + ggrefine::theme_grey() + labs(title = "ggrefine::theme_grey")  patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_light,   p_dark,   p_grey ) #> `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value `binwidth`. #> `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value `binwidth`. #> `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value `binwidth`.

title: Greyer theme — theme_grey
text: complete theme grey panel background white plot background. panel grid colour derived automatically blending panel_background_fill using blends::multiply(), producing subtly darker tone stays harmonious panel colour.

title: Greyer theme — theme_grey
code: theme_grey(   ...,   text_size = 10,   text_family = "",   text_colour = flexoki::flexoki$base["black"],   legend_place = "right",   legend_axis_line_colour = plot_background_fill,   legend_axis_line_linewidth = axis_line_linewidth,   legend_background_fill = plot_background_fill,   legend_key_fill = plot_background_fill,   legend_ticks_colour = legend_axis_line_colour,   legend_ticks_linewidth = legend_axis_line_linewidth,   legend_ticks_length = grid::unit(c(2.75, 0), "pt"),   axis_line_colour = flexoki::flexoki$base["base600"],   axis_line_linewidth = 0.25,   axis_ticks_colour = axis_line_colour,   axis_ticks_linewidth = axis_line_linewidth,   axis_ticks_length = grid::unit(3.66, "pt"),   panel_background_fill = "grey92",   panel_grid_colour = blends::multiply(panel_background_fill),   panel_grid_linetype = 1,   panel_grid_linewidth = 1,   panel_grid_minor_linetype = 1,   panel_grid_minor_linewidth = 0.5,   plot_background_fill = "white",   geom_fill = "#357BA2FF",   geom_colour = geom_fill,   palette_fill_discrete = jumble::jumble,   palette_colour_discrete = palette_fill_discrete,   palette_fill_continuous = viridis::turbo(n = 256),   palette_colour_continuous = palette_fill_continuous,   panel_widths = NULL,   panel_heights = NULL )

text: ggplot theme.

title: Greyer theme — theme_grey
code: library(ggplot2)  p_base_light <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy)) +   geom_histogram(     stat = "bin", shape = 21,     colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF")   ) +   scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) #> Warning: Ignoring unknown parameters: `shape`  p_base_dark <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy)) +   geom_histogram(     stat = "bin", shape = 21,     colour = blends::screen("#357BA2FF")   ) +   scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) #> Warning: Ignoring unknown parameters: `shape`  p_light  <- p_base_light + ggrefine::theme_light() + labs(title = "ggrefine::theme_light") p_dark  <- p_base_dark  + ggrefine::theme_dark() + labs(title = "ggrefine::theme_dark") p_grey <- p_base_light + ggrefine::theme_grey() + labs(title = "ggrefine::theme_grey")  patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_light,   p_dark,   p_grey ) #> `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value `binwidth`. #> `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value `binwidth`. #> `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value `binwidth`.

title: Lighter theme — theme_light
text: complete theme white panel background.

title: Lighter theme — theme_light
code: theme_light(   ...,   text_size = 10,   text_family = "",   text_colour = flexoki::flexoki$base["black"],   legend_place = "right",   legend_axis_line_colour = NULL,   legend_axis_line_linewidth = NULL,   legend_background_fill = NULL,   legend_key_fill = NULL,   legend_ticks_colour = NULL,   legend_ticks_linewidth = NULL,   legend_ticks_length = grid::unit(c(2.75, 0), "pt"),   axis_line_colour = flexoki::flexoki$base["base600"],   axis_line_linewidth = 0.25,   axis_ticks_colour = NULL,   axis_ticks_linewidth = NULL,   axis_ticks_length = grid::unit(3.66, "pt"),   panel_background_fill = "white",   panel_grid_colour = flexoki::flexoki$base["base50"],   panel_grid_linetype = 1,   panel_grid_linewidth = 1,   panel_grid_minor_linetype = 1,   panel_grid_minor_linewidth = 0.5,   plot_background_fill = "white",   geom_fill = "#357BA2FF",   geom_colour = geom_fill,   palette_fill_discrete = jumble::jumble,   palette_colour_discrete = palette_fill_discrete,   palette_fill_continuous = viridis::turbo(n = 256),   palette_colour_continuous = palette_fill_continuous,   panel_widths = NULL,   panel_heights = NULL )

title: Lighter theme — theme_light
text: ... Require named arguments (support trailing commas). text_size base size text theme element. Defaults 10. text_family base family text theme element. Defaults "". text_colour base colour text theme element. legend_place place legend. Either "right", "top" "bottom". legend_axis_line_colour colour legend.axis.line theme element. legend_axis_line_linewidth linewidth legend.axis.line theme element. legend_background_fill fill (colour) legend.background theme element. legend_key_fill fill (colour) legend.key theme element. legend_ticks_colour colour legend.ticks theme element. legend_ticks_linewidth linewidth legend.ticks theme element. legend_ticks_length length legend.ticks.length theme element. axis_line_colour colour axis.line theme element. axis_line_linewidth linewidth axis.line theme element. axis_ticks_colour colour axis.ticks theme element. axis_ticks_linewidth linewidth axis.ticks theme element. axis_ticks_length length axis.ticks.length theme element. panel_background_fill fill (colour) panel.background theme element. panel_grid_colour colour panel.grid theme element. panel_grid_linetype linetype panel.grid.major theme element. panel_grid_linewidth linewidth panel.grid.major theme element. panel_grid_minor_linetype linetype panel.grid.minor theme element. panel_grid_minor_linewidth linewidth panel.grid.minor theme element. plot_background_fill fill (colour) plot.background theme element. geom_fill default fill colour geom elements. geom_colour default border colour geom elements. Defaults geom_fill. palette_fill_discrete default discrete fill palette. function vector colours. palette_colour_discrete default discrete colour palette. Defaults palette_fill_discrete. palette_fill_continuous default continuous fill palette. vector colours. palette_colour_continuous default continuous colour palette. Defaults palette_fill_continuous. panel_widths panel.widths theme element. unit unit vector setting width individual panels, single unit total panel area width. Overrides aspect ratio set theme, coord, facets. Defaults NULL. panel_heights panel.heights theme element. unit unit vector setting height individual panels, single unit total panel area height. Overrides aspect ratio set theme, coord, facets. Defaults NULL.
